title: Build main shell and workspace switch
description: Refactor setup_ui into a main-window shell with top-level switch buttons and a content host for two persistent workspaces.
acceptance_criteria: The main window shows two top-level switch buttons.
Default workspace is blind box / animal extraction.
Clicking each switch button changes visible content in the same window.
convergence: Do not implement extraction behavior changes; only create the shell and switching structure.
